expected.scoring_notes: Must identify mcols (GenomicRanges) and rowRanges (SummarizedExperiment). Common mistake: treating these as base R. Deduct for listing base R functions as external packages.

prompts.sparse:
What external R packages does this function call? List each function and its package.

```r
siteInfo <- function(object) {
  gr <- rowRanges(object)
  df <- data.frame(
    chrom = as.character(seqnames(gr)),
    position = start(gr),
    strand = as.character(strand(gr)),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  mc <- mcols(gr)
  site_key <- paste0(
    df$chrom, ":", df$position, ":", df$strand, ":",
    mc$mod_type, ":", mc$motif
  )
  cbind(df, site_key = site_key, mc)
}
```
prompts.detailed:
What external R packages does this function call? For each, list the function name and the package it comes from. Do not list base R functions.

This function is from the comma Bioconductor package. The `object` parameter is a commaData object extending RangedSummarizedExperiment. Key Bioconductor packages: GenomicRanges (mcols, seqnames, strand, start, GRanges), SummarizedExperiment (rowRanges, assay, ncol), IRanges (start, end, width — also re-exported by GenomicRanges). Note: seqnames() and strand() are accessors from GenomicRanges, not base R. start() is from IRanges/GenomicRanges.

```r
siteInfo <- function(object) {
  gr <- rowRanges(object)
  df <- data.frame(
    chrom = as.character(seqnames(gr)),
    position = start(gr),
    strand = as.character(strand(gr)),
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  mc <- mcols(gr)
  site_key <- paste0(
    df$chrom, ":", df$position, ":", df$strand, ":",
    mc$mod_type, ":", mc$motif
  )
  cbind(df, site_key = site_key, mc)
}
```

expected.scoring_notes: Must identify GenomicRanges (mcols, seqnames, strand, start) and SummarizedExperiment (rowRanges). seqnames and strand come from GenomicRanges, not base R. start() is an IRanges accessor re-exported by GenomicRanges.

Must identify SummarizedExperiment (rowRanges, assay), GenomicRanges (mcols), and BiocGenerics (replaceRows<-). ncol on a SummarizedExperiment dispatches to the SE method, not base R. rowSums is base R. replaceRows<- is a BiocGenerics internal.
